name: Black Guerrilla Family
description: The Black Guerrilla Family (BGF) is an African-American Marxist-Leninist prison gang, street gang, and political organization founded in 1966 by George Jackson, George 'Big Jake' Lewis, and W.L. Nolen at San Quentin State Prison. Founded during the Black Power movement, its stated goals include promoting black power, maintaining dignity in prison, and overthrowing the US government. The BGF has 100-300 members with thousands of associates, active primarily in California and Maryland. A BGF member murdered Black Panther co-founder Huey P. Newton in 1989.
